reviews.title: Like constantly re-trying to pair it, get it...

reviews.title: Good and loud speaker
reviews.text:
Very good speaker, it has a lot of power. 
The only issues are the voice when you turn it on, that seems very useless and also the interrupting sound when the battery is running out of energy. 
When the battery is less than 30% charged, it begins to make a very annoying sound every 30 seconds. It can last working another 20 minutes with 30% of energy and still makes that annoying sound.
reviews.author: Adrian

reviews.title: Not my first choice
reviews.text: I was not impressed with this speaker.  The Insignia bluetooth speaker had better sound and battery life.  I know Insignia is not a brand name but in this case...the Insignia products are simply and clearly a better value.  Especially when they are on sale.  IMO, the Insignia counterpart sounded twice as good.  Give both a llisten side by side and I'd be shocked if you thought this sounded better.

reviews.author: Naffinator

reviews.title: Just Not Enough BOOM.
reviews.text:
This isn't a bad speaker for its size.  The "Boom" in its model name, is a bit optomistic.  Don't expect the quality of sound you would get from a larger Altec speaker, because with this size (a bit bigger than two decks of cards stacked together) you have to compromise.  

The reason I returned this little speaker was, it just wasn't loud enough for my needs.  I bought a UE WonderBoom LE, from Best Buy's clearance rack, and have been very happy with it's level of "Boom".  

If you don't need the volume, this is not a bad, budget speaker.

reviews.author: Juiceman

reviews.title: Baby Boom
reviews.text: It's basically what in its name.  It's a baby speaker.  Portable, extremely portable.  Can fit in your pocket, purse, or clipped onto furniture using a carabiner (it has an attachment spot on the corner).  Sound is good for a baby speaker.  Not amazing (hence 4 stars), but not bad either.  Just be realistic  in your expectations and you'll be fine.  I bought a couple to give as gifts when they were the daily deal ($10 each).  At that price, it was worth it for me.

reviews.title: Much Better Options Available
reviews.text: I originally got this as a Christmas present. It paired easily and the sound was great. But that lasted for only about 1 month. It was never exposed to water but after a month the sound stared to sound fuzzy as if it had water get in the speakers and then it started to crack and pop. Took it back as we had the warranty. Got a new one. This one worked great for about 3 months until it would not pair with my phone. Out of nowhere it would not connect and now when trying to pair with my phone it shows doesn’t even so it trying to pair in my Bluetooth setting. Ever time it get the error unable to pair. Tried with other phones and same issue. Maybe I was unlucky and got two bad ones but just be aware.
reviews.author: Otto825
